ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(RecordType.DeveloperName = 'M' ,RecordType.DeveloperName = 'O' ,RecordType.DeveloperName = 'SH') , Creating__c = false , Refusal__c = false , PriceList__c = false , CASESAFEID(AttributeSurveyTarget__c) != $Label.ACCOUNT_UNKNOWN , CASESAFEID(AttributeSurveyTarget__c) != $Label.ACCOUNT_UNDECIDED , ISBLANK( TEXT(AttributeSurveyRequirement__c)))
ValidationRule.errorMessage: 属性調査要否の選択は必須です。
